data.Modification: Iodoacetamide derivative/Addition of Glycine/Addition of G

project.title: Identification of proteins that interacted with ESCO2
project.projectDescription: The Flag–ESCO2 plasmids were transfected into HEK293T cells, Flag–ESCO2 complexes were co-immunoprecipitated using an anti-Flag antibody. The Flag–ESCO2 complexes was separated using SDS PAGE, and then was identified by combining silver staining and mass spectrometry.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: The Flag–ESCO2 plasmids were transfected into HEK293T cells, Flag–ESCO2 complexes were co-immunoprecipitated using an anti-Flag antibody. The Flag–ESCO2 complexes was separated using SDS PAGE, and then was identified by combining silver staining and mass spectrometry.
project.dataProcessingProtocol: The peptides identified by mass spectrometry can be retrieved from the UNIPROT database to obtain the final data.

references.referenceLine: Zhu HE, Li T, Shi S, Chen DX, Chen W, Chen H. ESCO2 promotes lung adenocarcinoma progression by regulating hnRNPA1 acetylation. J Exp Clin Cancer Res. 2021 40(1):64
